message:
Optimize Rust build performance in CI workflow
- Replace deprecated actions-rs/toolchain with dtolnay/rust-toolchain
- Fix cache path to properly cache rust/target directory
- Reduce tokio and hyper feature flags from "full" to specific needed features
- Should significantly reduce build times by avoiding unnecessary dependencies
